instructions: Copy this file into workspace/KEYFRAMES.json before writing still-image prompt development for a new project.
Keep reusable prompt anchors here and reserve final executable video prompts for PROMPT-PACK.json.
Replace every placeholder prompt, ID, model value, and frame goal with project-specific content.
workflowNotes: Replace with a workflow note about how still-image prompts should be used in this project.
Replace with a workflow note about how approved keyframes should be promoted into references or canon.

anchors.name: Primary Subject Anchor
details: Replace with a reusable visual identity detail.
Replace with a reusable environment, wardrobe, or texture detail.

shots.frameGoal: Replace with what this keyframe set needs to prove or define.

frames.prompt: Replace with a still-image prompt for the opening frame target.
Replace with a still-image prompt for the ending frame target.
